title: Youmind 13407 Youmind 13407
prompt:
photorealism, {argument name="subject" default="car sheet"}, four-view, side view, top view, backside view, front view
- car has {argument name="wheels" default="4"} wheels
- car is a {argument name="car type" default="double seater sports car"}
- back wheels are same with as the car

photorealism, {argument name="subject" default="car sheet"}, four-view, side view, top view, backside view, front view

promptTranslations.zh:
写实主义，{argument name="subject" default="汽车座椅"}，四视图，侧视图，俯视图，后视图，正视图
- 汽车有{argument name="wheels" default="4"}个轮子
- 汽车为{argument name="car type" default="双座跑车"}
- 后轮宽度与车身相同
promptTranslations.fr:
photoréalisme, {argument name="subject" default="tissu de voiture"}, vues quadruples, vue de côté, vue de dessus, vue arrière, vue avant
- la voiture a {argument name="wheels" default="4"} roues
- la voiture est une {argument name="car type" default="voiture de sport biplace"}
- les roues arrière ont la même largeur que la voiture
promptTranslations.ru:
фотореализм, {argument name="subject" default="автомобильный чехол"}, четыре вида: вид сбоку, сверху, сзади, спереди
- у автомобиля {argument name="wheels" default="4"} колеса
- автомобиль — {argument name="car type" default="двухместный спортивный автомобиль"}
- задние колёса совпадают по ширине с автомобилем
promptTranslations.pt:
Use o prompt em inglês abaixo para gerar a imagem; mantenha textos visíveis, nomes de marca, valores de variáveis e parâmetros em inglês.

photorealism, {argument name="subject" default="car sheet"}, four-view, side view, top view, backside view, front view
- car has {argument name="wheels" default="4"} wheels
- car is a {argument name="car type" default="double seater sports car"}
- back wheels are same with as the car
promptTranslations.ja:

- 車は{argument name="wheels" default="4"}ホイールを装着
